first_meet: Oh! Hello there my fellow HhUmAn BaBbY.
Have you seen my ducklings? They wandered off somewhere...
Please, if you find them, bring them back to me!
reminder: It's getting late... I hope they're okay.
Thank you for helping me look.
How long are you planning to take?
duckling_returned: You found one! Thank you so much!
Keep looking for the otehrs, they have to be around here somewhere.
all_ducklings_returned: You found them all! Thank you so much for your help! ;3
I don't know how I can repay you.
Maybe a duck kiss would be reward enough.
